This painting is all about excitement and carefree vibes.  The randomness expresses a let loose attitude.  It is a graffiti style so rules do not apply.  This painting uses several techniques, which are exciting when mixed together. The mixture varies not only in color, but also from actual brush strokes at the bottom right, splattering used throughout the middle section and a spray paint line on the left.  The use of a mostly white background suggests that the artists is breaking convention.  The strong black line suggests that a person of color is represented who is reaching out to another person of color that is represented by the brownish line on the left.  That combination and the theory I have given it, excites me to think of the possibilities of cooperation. It is very empowering.
